    A

    AppLauncher - Class in com.library
    Application entry-point wrapper.
    AppLauncher() - Constructor for class com.library.AppLauncher
     
    applyAuthorsFilter() - Method in class com.library.controller.MainController
    Reads all active filter values and delegates to AuthorDao.search(String, String, Integer, Integer).
    applyBooksFilter() - Method in class com.library.controller.MainController
    Reads all active filter values and delegates to BookDao.search(String, String, Integer, Integer).
    applyLoansFilter() - Method in class com.library.controller.MainController
    Reads all active filter values and delegates to LoanDao.search(String, String, LocalDate, LocalDate).
    applyReadersFilter() - Method in class com.library.controller.MainController
    Reads all active filter values and delegates to ReaderDao.search(String, LocalDate, LocalDate).
    Author - Class in com.library.model
    Represents an author entity in the Library Management System.
    Author() - Constructor for class com.library.model.Author
    No-arg constructor required for DAO result mapping.
    Author(int, String, String, int) - Constructor for class com.library.model.Author
    Full constructor used by AuthorDaoImpl when mapping a ResultSet.
    authorBirthYearCol - Variable in class com.library.controller.MainController
     
    authorComboBox() - Method in class com.library.controller.MainController
    Creates an Author ComboBox populated with all authors from the database.

    authorCountryFilter - Variable in class com.library.controller.MainController
     
    authorDao - Variable in class com.library.controller.MainController

    Data Access Object interface for the Author entity.

    JDBC implementation of AuthorDao.
    AuthorDaoImpl() - Constructor for class com.library.dao.impl.AuthorDaoImpl
     
    authorId - Variable in class com.library.model.Book
    Foreign key referencing authors.id (NOT NULL in DB).
    authorIdCol - Variable in class com.library.controller.MainController
     
    authorName - Variable in class com.library.model.Book
    Denormalized author name populated via JOIN in DAO queries.

    B

    birthYear - Variable in class com.library.model.Author
    Year of birth; 0 is used as a sentinel for "not set" (stored as NULL in the database).
    Book - Class in com.library.model
    Represents a book entity in the Library Management System.

    No-arg constructor required for DAO result mapping.

    D

    DBConnection - Class in com.library.db
    Singleton wrapper around the JDBC Connection to the PostgreSQL database.
    DBConnection() - Constructor for class com.library.db.DBConnection
    Private constructor — loads credentials from .env and opens the JDBC connection.
    delete(int) - Method in interface com.library.dao.AuthorDao
    Deletes the author with the given id.
    delete(int) - Method in interface com.library.dao.BookDao
    Deletes the book with the given id.

    Deletes the author with the given id.

    Deletes the book with the given id.

    Deletes the loan with the given id.

    Deletes the reader with the given id.

    dialog(String) - Method in class com.library.controller.MainController
    Creates a generic Dialog with OK and Cancel buttons and no header text.
    dueDate - Variable in class com.library.model.Loan
    Deadline by which the book must be returned.

    E

    email - Variable in class com.library.model.Reader
    Email address; nullable but UNIQUE when present.
    equals(Object) - Method in class com.library.model.Book
    Two books are equal if and only if their Book.id values match.

    findAll() - Method in interface com.library.dao.AuthorDao
    Returns all authors ordered by full_name ascending.
    findAll() - Method in interface com.library.dao.BookDao
    Returns all books ordered by id ascending.
    findAll() - Method in class com.library.dao.impl.AuthorDaoImpl
     
    findAll() - Method in class com.library.dao.impl.BookDaoImpl
     
    findAll() - Method in class com.library.dao.impl.LoanDaoImpl
     
    findAll() - Method in class com.library.dao.impl.ReaderDaoImpl
     
    findAll() - Method in interface com.library.dao.LoanDao
    Returns all loans ordered by id descending (newest first).
    findAll() - Method in interface com.library.dao.ReaderDao
    Returns all readers ordered by full_name ascending.
    findAllCountries() - Method in interface com.library.dao.AuthorDao
    Returns distinct country values present in the database, sorted alphabetically.
    findAllCountries() - Method in class com.library.dao.impl.AuthorDaoImpl
     
    findAllGenres() - Method in interface com.library.dao.BookDao
    Returns distinct genre values present in the database, sorted alphabetically.
    findAllGenres() - Method in class com.library.dao.impl.BookDaoImpl

    Returns all books belonging to the given author.

    Finds a single author by its primary key.

    fullName - Variable in class com.library.model.Reader

    I

    id - Variable in class com.library.model.Author

    id - Variable in class com.library.model.Reader
    Primary key.
    initAuthorFilters() - Method in class com.library.controller.MainController
    Populates the country ComboBox from the database and attaches change listeners so the table reacts immediately to any filter change.
    initBookFilters() - Method in class com.library.controller.MainController
    Populates the genre ComboBox from the database and attaches change listeners so the table reacts immediately to any filter change.
    initialize() - Method in class com.library.controller.MainController
    Called automatically by FXMLLoader after all @FXML fields have been injected.
    initLoanFilters() - Method in class com.library.controller.MainController
    Populates the status ComboBox and attaches change listeners so the table reacts immediately to any filter change.
    initReaderFilters() - Method in class com.library.controller.MainController
    Attaches change listeners to reader filter controls so the table reacts immediately to any change.

    Inserts a new author record.

    The single shared instance; null until first use.
    isbn - Variable in class com.library.model.Book
    ISBN code; nullable, unique in the DB.

    label(String) - Static method in class com.library.controller.MainController
    Creates a right-aligned Label with a fixed minimum width, used as a form row label in dialog grids.

    mapRow(ResultSet) - Method in class com.library.dao.impl.AuthorDaoImpl
    Maps the current row of a ResultSet to an Author object.
    mapRow(ResultSet) - Method in class com.library.dao.impl.BookDaoImpl
    Maps the current row of a ResultSet to a Book object.
    mapRow(ResultSet) - Method in class com.library.dao.impl.LoanDaoImpl
    Maps the current row of a ResultSet to a Loan object.
    mapRow(ResultSet) - Method in class com.library.dao.impl.ReaderDaoImpl
    Maps the current row of a ResultSet to a Reader object.
    MARK_OVERDUE - Static variable in class com.library.dao.impl.LoanDaoImpl
     
    markOverdue() - Method in class com.library.dao.impl.LoanDaoImpl
     
    markOverdue() - Method in interface com.library.dao.LoanDao
    Sets status to "overdue" for all active loans whose due_date is before today.

    O

    okFilter(Dialog, Supplier) - Method in class com.library.controller.MainController
    Attaches a validation filter to the OK button of a dialog.
    onAddAuthor() - Method in class com.library.controller.MainController
    Opens the Add Author dialog; inserts on OK.
    onAddBook() - Method in class com.library.controller.MainController
    Opens the Add Book dialog; inserts on OK.
    onAddLoan() - Method in class com.library.controller.MainController
    Opens the Add Loan dialog; inserts on OK.
    onAddReader() - Method in class com.library.controller.MainController
    Opens the Add Reader dialog; inserts on OK.
    onClearAuthorsFilter() - Method in class com.library.controller.MainController
    Resets all author filter controls; change listeners trigger MainController.applyAuthorsFilter() automatically.
    onClearBooksFilter() - Method in class com.library.controller.MainController
    Resets all book filter controls; change listeners trigger MainController.applyBooksFilter() automatically.
    onClearLoansFilter() - Method in class com.library.controller.MainController
    Resets all loan filter controls; change listeners trigger MainController.applyLoansFilter() automatically.
    onClearReadersFilter() - Method in class com.library.controller.MainController
    Resets all reader filter controls; change listeners trigger MainController.applyReadersFilter() automatically.
    onDeleteAuthor() - Method in class com.library.controller.MainController
    Confirms and deletes the selected author.
    onDeleteBook() - Method in class com.library.controller.MainController
    Confirms and deletes the selected book.
    onDeleteLoan() - Method in class com.library.controller.MainController
    Confirms and deletes the selected loan.
    onDeleteReader() - Method in class com.library.controller.MainController
    Confirms and deletes the selected reader.
    onEditAuthor() - Method in class com.library.controller.MainController
    Opens the Edit Author dialog pre-filled with the selected row; updates on OK.
    onEditBook() - Method in class com.library.controller.MainController
    Opens the Edit Book dialog pre-filled with the selected row; updates on OK.
    onEditLoan() - Method in class com.library.controller.MainController
    Opens the Edit Loan dialog pre-filled with the selected row; updates on OK.
    onEditReader() - Method in class com.library.controller.MainController
    Opens the Edit Reader dialog pre-filled with the selected row; updates on OK.

    P

    parseIntOrNull(String) - Static method in class com.library.controller.MainController
    Parses a string to an Integer, returning null on blank or invalid input (used for optional filter range bounds).
    phone - Variable in class com.library.model.Reader
    Phone number in any format; nullable.
    pubYear - Variable in class com.library.model.Book
    Publication year; 0 is used as a sentinel for "not set" (stored as NULL in the database).

    Q

    query(String, List) - Method in class com.library.dao.impl.AuthorDaoImpl
    Executes a parameterized SELECT and maps all rows to Author objects.
    query(String, List) - Method in class com.library.dao.impl.BookDaoImpl
    Executes a parameterized SELECT and maps all rows to Book objects.
    query(String, List) - Method in class com.library.dao.impl.LoanDaoImpl
    Executes a parameterized SELECT and maps all rows to Loan objects.
    query(String, List) - Method in class com.library.dao.impl.ReaderDaoImpl
    Executes a parameterized SELECT and maps all rows to Reader objects.

    R

    Reader - Class in com.library.model
    Represents a library reader (patron) in the Library Management System.

    No-arg constructor required for DAO result mapping.

    refreshAuthorFilters() - Method in class com.library.controller.MainController
    Refreshes the country ComboBox items after a new author has been added.
    refreshBookFilters() - Method in class com.library.controller.MainController
    Refreshes the genre ComboBox items after a new book has been added (the new book's genre may not yet be in the list).
    regDate - Variable in class com.library.model.Reader
    Registration date.

    S

    search(String, String, Integer, Integer) - Method in interface com.library.dao.AuthorDao
    Dynamic multi-field search with optional filters.
    search(String, String, Integer, Integer) - Method in interface com.library.dao.BookDao
    Dynamic multi-field search with optional filters.
    search(String, String, Integer, Integer) - Method in class com.library.dao.impl.AuthorDaoImpl
    Builds and executes a dynamic WHERE clause.
    search(String, String, Integer, Integer) - Method in class com.library.dao.impl.BookDaoImpl
    Builds and executes a dynamic WHERE clause.
    search(String, String, LocalDate, LocalDate) - Method in class com.library.dao.impl.LoanDaoImpl
    Builds and executes a dynamic WHERE clause.
    search(String, String, LocalDate, LocalDate) - Method in interface com.library.dao.LoanDao
    Dynamic multi-field search with optional filters.
    search(String, LocalDate, LocalDate) - Method in class com.library.dao.impl.ReaderDaoImpl
    Builds and executes a dynamic WHERE clause.
    search(String, LocalDate, LocalDate) - Method in interface com.library.dao.ReaderDao

    Base SELECT shared by all read methods.

    Base SELECT used by all read methods to avoid repetition.

    Binds an int parameter or sets SQL NULL when the value is 0 (sentinel for "not set", following the model convention).
    setNullableInt(PreparedStatement, int, int) - Method in class com.library.dao.impl.BookDaoImpl

    str(int) - Static method in class com.library.controller.MainController
    Converts an int to a display string, returning an empty string for 0 (the "not set" sentinel used in the models).

    Creates a lightweight StringConverter from a single toString lambda (the fromString direction is unused).
